case_title: BRUCE MURPHY VS. BANK OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-23-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURPHY, BRUCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
